retry_reason: All operations are unconditional puts; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This function releases references to the ucode, pcm, initvals, and initvals_band firmware structures by calling b43_do_release_fw on each. After this call, all those firmware pointers are invalid and must not be accessed. It also signals the completion of firmware loading via dev->fw_load_complete. This function is typically called at the end of a firmware loading attempt or when the device is being torn down. Caller must ensure that no further firmware operations occur after calling this function.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release references to four firmware objects via b43_do_release_fw (put operations). The complete() call is a minor lifecycle signal, but the function's core and only significant work is refcount management.

The callee is a put function on its parameter (index 1), and the access path from dev through the struct hierarchy to the refcount field is consistent with the callee's type chain (b43_wldev--b43_firmware--b43_firmware_file--firmware--fw_priv--kref--refcount_t). The segment count (7) matches the number of types, so all operations are valid.
